productDisplayName: Lino Perros Women Sporty Brown Pouch
description: You only have one chance to make a good first impression, so if you want to look smart, the lino perros Handbag Collection provides you with a superb array of ideas. The bags are all spacious, with multiple compartments and pockets allowing you to carry a lot more, and still be well organised. The collection is characterised by exciting design elements that break the monotony & make the bags more fun! Height: 17 cm Width: 12 cm Depth: 3 cm Made of polyester for durability Has one zippered compartment with organiser sleeve for a mobile and essentials A zippered compartment on the front with Two short straps and a long adjustable and removable strap for carrying ease and style Brand name appliqué d on the front A zippered pocket with a velcro closure on the front for additional space Care Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust
